name: Admissible Existence Seed Cycle
allowed_use_boundary: Use as an internal StegVerse ecosystem seed-cycle status mirror.
Use as compatibility evidence for transition-table mapping tests.
Do not use as external certification, endorsement, or execution authority.
claims: The record can be represented as a framework entry for compatibility testing.
The record can be mapped against transition-table elements.

transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority
transition_table_mapping.output_artifact_type: external framework manifest and compatibility report
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: StegVerse ecosystem status surface; no independent external authority granted
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: source repository plus local mirror record
transition_table_mapping.policy_or_rule_model: non-authority boundary and fail-closed missing-field behavior
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: manifest plus report can be regenerated from registry state
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: status propagation, evidence mirror, transition-table compatibility mapping
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing source, undefined overlap, missing transition-table mapping, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
